title: lathyrus lanszwertii var. lanszwertii
intro: Lathyrus lanszwertii var. lanszwertii, also known as Lanz's pea or Lanz's vetchling, is a perennial legume plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help with urinary issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lathyrus lanszwertii var. lanszwertii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus lanszwertii var. lanszwertii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
